case_title: DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS VS. RAYMOND RONQUILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: ORIGINAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 806 URBANO DRIVE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94127 SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***PLEASE INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $465.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-10-2016, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA SERVED OCT-06-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL. $231.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA

RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA SERVED OCT-06-2016, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF KOUTSOFTAS, DEMETRIOUS C. AS BENEFICIARY OF PENSCO TRUST COMPANY CUSTODIAN FBO DEMETRIOUS C. KOUTSOFTAS IRA AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RONQUILLO, RAYMOND
